metadata.career_relevance: The best coder in the room who can't communicate their thinking will lose to a mediocre coder who narrates clearly. Every Zerodha, Flipkart, and Razorpay interviewer explicitly evaluates communication alongside code correctness.

key_takeaways: Clarify BEFORE coding: restate, ask constraints, create examples
Complexity script: '[O(X)] because [reason]. Could we do better? [alternative + tradeoff]'
Stuck script: narrate, brute force first, ask targeted question
Time budget: 2 min clarify, 3 min plan, 20 min code, 5 min test, 10 min discuss
Code style: meaningful names, comments, edge cases first, test aloud
Pattern recognition: Two Pointers, Sliding Window, Prefix Sum, Stack, BFS/DFS, DP, Binary Search, Heap
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: Problem-Solving Framework — 7-step process for any coding problem.
